issues.detail: Skill lacks handling for encrypted PDFs, missing dependencies, and corrupted files, limiting robustness.

scenarios.name: Quarterly financial PDF to RAG-ready JSON with tables
scenarios.rationale: Treatment extracts text with pdfplumber's layout=True, tables via extract_tables with vertical_strategy='text' converted to dicts keyed by header row, plus chunk_for_rag with overlap and unified pdf_to_ai_ready output; baseline uses raw PyPDF2 page.extract_text and skips tables entirely.

scenarios.name: Batch process mixed digital + scanned legal contracts
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs the pdfplumber pipeline first, detects scanned docs by checking total extracted text length, and falls back to PyMuPDF get_pixmap at dpi=300 piped into pytesseract.image_to_string as documented; baseline lacks the digital-vs-scanned detection heuristic and uses ad-hoc OCR.
